hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: Command.Parse, OK: Command.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: ParseResult.Invoke, OK: ParseErrorAction.Invoke, OK: HelpAction.Invoke, OK: ParseResult.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

options.name: --base
options.description: The base path to which input, exclude, and output parameters are relative. If this is not specified, the current directory is used.

options.name: --input
options.description: Input Markdown file(s). Only relative file paths can be specified, relative to the base parameter. Multiple parameter values are allowed. File glob patterns (* and **) are supported.

options.name: --exclude
options.description: Input Markdown file exclusion(s). Only relative file paths can be specified, relative to the base parameter. Multiple parameter values are allowed. File glob patterns (* and **) are supported. Do not prefix with !.

options.name: --template
options.description: HTML template file. This must contain a [content] placeholder for the converted content and can contain a [title] placeholder for the title. This can be an absolute path or a path relative to the base parameter.

options.name: --output
options.description: Output HTML file, only valid when a single input file is matched. When multiple files are matched or when this is not specified, output is written to a .html file in the same folder as the .md file. This can be an absolute path or a path relative to the base parameter.
